name: Oriental Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 1 chunk peeled fresh ginger (about 1 1/2 x 3/4 x 3/8 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar, peppercorns, ginger, and lemon zest in a clean, dry 16-ounce bottle.
2. Trim the bottom of the lemon grass, remove the outer leaf, and cut it into halves across.
3. Add the prepared lemon grass to the bottle.
4. Seal with a cork.
5. Steep for one week. The vinegar should be ready to use immediately after steeping and will have a shelf life of at least 1 year.
